memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Eaton - Eunice Singletery FGR by Nathan Hale Gardner
Thomas Eaton: Dedicated Family, Church and Community Leader
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas Eaton was a wealthy and successful farmer and community leader. He was a Selectman. Selectmen were responsible for local licensing, the town watch, and poor relief.
On May 14, 1692, Thomas was …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ensign Thomas Eaton於1626年2月19日之前出生在英國瓦維其可爾哈頓時，他的父親John Eaton11623歲，母親Ann32歲。他於1656年8月14日與Martha Kent在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1708年12月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾塔可特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ensign Thomas Eaton于1626年2月19日之前出生在英国瓦維其可爾哈頓时，他的父亲John Eaton11623岁，母亲Ann32岁。他于1656年8月14日与Martha Kent在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1708年12月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾塔可特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Eaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Eaton or Eton, such as Eaton Socon (Bedfordshire), Eaton (Cheshire), or Eton (Buckinghamshire), named from either Old English ēa ‘river’ or ēg ‘island, low-lying land’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Nathaneal Eaton, born in Coventry, England, c. 1609, came to MA in 1637 and was the first head of Harvard College, in 1638–39.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest Grave Seen in the Memorials List.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ensign Thomas Eaton was born before 19 February 1626, in Hatton, Warwickshire, England, his father, John Eaton, was 11623 and his mother, Ann, was 32. He married Martha Kent on 14 August 1656, in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 15 December 1708, in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Pentucket Cemetery, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ensign Thomas Eaton est né avant 19 février 1626, à Hatton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Eaton, avait 11623 ans et sa mère, Ann, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Martha Kent le 14 août 1656, à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1708, à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Pentucket Cemetery, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ensign Thomas Eaton vor 19. Februar 1626 in Hatton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Eaton 11623 und seine Mutter Ann 32. Er hat am 14. August 1656 in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Martha Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1708 in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Pentucket Cemetery, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ensign Thomas Eaton è nato il prima del 19 febbraio 1626 nel Hatton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, John Eaton, aveva 11623 anni e il suo madre, Ann, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Martha Kent il 14 agosto 1656, nel Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1708, nel Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Pentucket Cemetery, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ensign Thomas Eatonが1626年2月19日以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父John Eatonは11623歳，母Annは32歳であった。1656年8月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスヘイバーヒルでMartha Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1708年12月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスヘイバーヒルで死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルペントゥクエト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ensign Thomas Eaton(이)가 1626년 2월 19일 이전 영국 워윅실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Eaton(은)는 11623세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1656년 8월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐에서 Martha Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1708년 12월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐에서 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐 펜투c케트 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ensign Thomas Eaton nasceu antes 19 de fevereiro de 1626, em Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Eaton, tinha 11623 anos e sua mãe, Ann, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Kent em 14 de agosto de 1656, em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1708, em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Pentucket Cemetery, Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ensign Thomas Eaton родился перед 19 февраль 1626 г. в местности хаттон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Eaton было 11623 года, а матери, которую звали Ann, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Kent 14 августа 1656 г. в местности хавирилл, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 15 декабря 1708 г. в местности хавирилл, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности пентуккет кеметири, хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ensign Thomas Eaton nació antes de 19 de febrero de 1626, en Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Eaton, tenía 11623 años y su mamá, Ann, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Martha Kent el 14 de agosto de 1656, en Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1708, en Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Pentucket Cemetery, Haverhill, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
